# Check what changed after SPACE
if last_transition:
    before = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation
    after = last_transition.after_frame.segmentation
    before_nodes = {n['id']:
        print(")
    after_nodes = {n['id']: n['id']: n for n in after['nodes']}
    print("Nodes before:", list(before_nodes.keys()))
    print("Nodes after:", list(after_nodes.keys()))
    # Check for differences
    for nid in before_nodes:
        bn = before_nodes[nid]
        an = after_nodes.get(nid)
        if an:
            if bn['pixels'] != an['pixels']:
                print(f"Node {nid] pixels: {bn['pixels']} -> {an['pixels']}")
        else:
            print(f"Node {nid} disappeared")
    for nid in after_nodes:
        if nid not in before_nodes:
            print(f"Node {nid} appeared")
    print("No change detected" if before_nodes == after_nodes else "Changes detected")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
